mainEntity.name: Can I still get workers comp for lung problems if I used to be a smoker?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, you can still qualify if workplace exposure significantly aggravated your condition or contributed to the illness. You will need a medical expert to testify that your job was a substantial contributing factor despite your smoking history.
